rows.description: paid for flooring of Room over ye new Bursary
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms 'gpt-5-mini' reading of 0 pounds, 1 shilling, 0 pence. 'claude-haiku' misread the shillings and pence as 7 and 6, and had a very different description ('paving of new doorway in new Nursery').

rows.description: paid Dan. Collin in full of his first Bill of Candles
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms 'gpt-5-mini' reading of 21 pounds, 10 shillings, 0 pence. 'claude-haiku' missed the pounds amount (read as 0) and had a very different description ('Dav Gelatine in full of his foot Bill of Candels').

rows.description: paid Dodd for lighting of winter Lamps
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms 'gpt-5-mini' reading of 1 pound, 3 shillings, 0 pence. 'claude-haiku' misread pounds as 21 and had description differences ('Dad for lighting of window dampers').

rows.description: paid Cook and Dinner & xmas Gaudies
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms 'gpt-5-mini' reading of 1 pound, 15 shillings, 4 pence, and its accurate description. 'claude-haiku' significantly under-read the shillings (as 4) and missed the pence, and had a slight description difference ('accs.').

rows.description: paid into ye Treasury Chest 200 Guineas
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms 'gpt-5-mini' reading of 210 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence, and its accurate description and note regarding the 200 guineas conversion. 'claude-haiku' had a very poor reading for both description and amounts.
All extractors agreed on this row's values. Visually confirmed.

rows.description: paid mr. Horner for Battle Books, Ink & Paper
rows.notes: All extractors agreed on the monetary values for this row. Visual verification confirmed 'Battle Books' as per 'gpt-5-mini's description over 'claude-haiku's 'Bottle Books'.

rows.description: paid the Cooks Bill for washing of Hall, mens &c
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms 'gpt-5-mini' reading of 3 pounds, 13 shillings, 4 pence, and its description ('mens &c'). 'claude-haiku' misread pence as 6 and description slightly ('money &c.').
